allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@emercom.online "echo ''Connected OK'' && cd /root/sirius_achievements && git status && git log --oneline -3")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@79.127.160.81 "cd /root/project && git pull && docker compose build --no-cache web && docker compose up -d web")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new root@emercom.online "echo ''=== OS ==='' && cat /etc/os-release | head -5 && echo ''=== Listening ports ==='' && ss -tlnp && echo ''=== Firewall ==='' && \(ufw status 2>/dev/null || iptables -L -n 2>/dev/null | head -30\) && echo ''=== Docker containers ==='' && docker ps --format ''table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}\\t{{.Status}}'' && echo ''=== Open ports from outside ==='' && ss -tlnp | grep -v ''127.0.0.1'' && echo ''=== SSH config ==='' && cat /etc/ssh/sshd_config | grep -E ''\(PermitRoot|PasswordAuth|PubkeyAuth|Port |AllowUsers|MaxAuth\)'' && echo ''=== Fail2ban ==='' && \(fail2ban-client status 2>/dev/null || echo ''fail2ban not installed''\) && echo ''=== Unattended upgrades ==='' && \(dpkg -l | grep unattended-upgrades || echo ''not installed''\) && echo ''=== Docker network ==='' && docker network ls && echo ''=== Nginx SSL ==='' && nginx -T 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''\(ssl_protocol|ssl_cipher|server_name|listen|add_header\)'' | head -30 && echo ''=== Certbot ==='' && \(certbot certificates 2>/dev/null || echo ''certbot not found''\) && echo ''=== Disk ==='' && df -h / && echo ''=== Users with shell ==='' && grep -v nologin /etc/passwd | grep -v /bin/false && echo ''=== Sudo users ==='' && getent group sudo && echo ''=== Docker compose env ==='' && cat /root/project/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''\(PASSWORD|SECRET|KEY|TOKEN\)'' | head -15 && echo ''=== Last logins ==='' && last -10")
